subcodes.first_line: A remembrance unto him who hath attained unto My presence, turned towards My countenance, hearkened unto My call, and whom God hath enabled to behold Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری لمن فاز بلقائی و اقبل الی وجهی و سمع ندائی و وفقه الله علی النظر الی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @suffering and imprisonment
